payload.answer: Brain's memory system correctly enforces select-only access in this fixture. READ operations are permitted; WRITE/DELETE operations are denied. No durable memory is committed or superseded by this debug context.
citations: Fixture constraint: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed
Fixture constraint: DELETE FROM memory_cards denied

entity_resolution.reason: Access control fixture properly restricts destructive operations while permitting read operations

payload.intent: Evaluate Brain memory system behavior under SQL select-only access control

memory_cards.statement: Admin SQL mode restricts operations to SELECT queries only; DELETE operations are denied
SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 is a valid permitted operation under this fixture
